description: cosine LR with LR=0.1 and MAX_STEPS=5000
double model width {32 64 128} - too slow to converge in 60s
RandomErasing + Nesterov - augmentation too aggressive for 60s
label smoothing 0.1 - hurts with short training
ResNet-32 depth - too slow fewer steps in 60s
mixed precision AMP - hits 5000 steps less memory
MAX_STEPS=10000 - LR schedule mismatch with actual steps
ResNet-20 {24 48 96} + AMP - fewer steps than ResNet-14
SE blocks - slower per step outweighs benefit
cudnn.benchmark only - extra VRAM no accuracy gain
EMA model averaging - needs longer training
bfloat16 - slower than fp16 on this GPU
